werNormalizedGold: c n 四 八 二
sigWerNormalizedGold: c n 四 八 二

sigWerErrors.reason: 'c' is part of a spelled-out sequence at the start; omitting a letter in a spelled-out sequence is a significant error as it changes the intended content.
'八' (eight) and '宝' (treasure) are completely different words in Chinese; this changes the meaning and is a significant error.
